name: Mrs. Fields Chocolate Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a cookie sheet with aluminum foil.
2. In a double boiler, melt the semisweet and milk chocolate with the oil over hot, not simmering, water, stirring constantly until the chocolate is melted.
3. Remove the top part of the double boiler and let the chocolate cool to tepid (The chocolate may thicken slightly as it cools).
4. Stir in the nuts, white chocolate, Heath pieces, and M&M pieces into the cooled, melted chocolate and pour the mixture onto the prepared cookie sheet. Spread to the desired thickness. Refrigerate for 20 - 30 minutes, or until set.
5. Slide a metal spatula under the chocolate to loosen from the foil. Break into pieces.
